ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the patient */,
  "registered_on" TEXT /* Date the patient was registered in the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the patient's information was last updated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions that might affect mobility */,
  "primary_care_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient's primary care provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mobility_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mobility data entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "distance_travelled" REAL /* Distance travelled by the patient in meters */,
  "duration_on_wheelchair" REAL /* Duration the patient spent in the wheelchair in minutes */,
  "distance_from_home" REAL /* Average distance from home in meters */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the data was recorded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the data was recorded */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wearable device if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobility_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekly_mobility_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weekly summary entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the summary belongs to */,
  "week_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "week_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  "max_distance_7days" REAL /* Maximum distance travelled in meters over the week */,
  "min_distance_7days" REAL /* Minimum distance travelled in meters over the week */,
  "mean_distance_7days" REAL /* Mean distance travelled in meters over the week */,
  "variance_distance_7days" REAL /* Variance of distance travelled in meters over the week */,
  "max_duration_7days" REAL /* Maximum duration spent in the wheelchair in minutes over the week */,
  "min_duration_7days" REAL /* Minimum duration spent in the wheelchair in minutes over the week */,
  "mean_duration_7days" REAL /* Mean duration spent in the wheelchair in minutes over the week */,
  "variance_duration_7days" REAL /* Variance of duration spent in the wheelchair in minutes over the week */,
  "max_distance_from_home_7days" REAL /* Maximum distance from home in meters over the week */,
  "min_distance_from_home_7days" REAL /* Minimum distance from home in meters over the week */,
  "mean_distance_from_home_7days" REAL /* Mean distance from home in meters over the week */,
  "variance_distance_from_home_7days" REAL /* Variance of distance from home in meters over the week */,
  "total_activities" INTEGER /* Total number of activities recorded during the week */,
  "peak_distance_day" TEXT /* Date of the day with the maximum distance traveled */,
  "peak_duration_day" TEXT /* Date of the day with the maximum duration on the wheelchair */,
  "peak_distance_from_home_day" TEXT /* Date of the day with the maximum distance from home */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_mobility_summary_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "long_term_mobility_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each long-term trend entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the trend belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend period */,
  "total_distance_travelled" REAL /* Total distance travelled by the patient in meters */,
  "total_duration_on_wheelchair" REAL /* Total duration the patient spent in the wheelchair in minutes */,
  "average_distance_from_home" REAL /* Average distance from home in meters */,
  "distance_trend" TEXT /* Trend in distance travelled (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "duration_trend" TEXT /* Trend in duration spent in the wheelchair (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "distance_from_home_trend" TEXT /* Trend in distance from home (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "total_activities" INTEGER /* Total number of activities recorded during the trend period */,
  "peak_distance_day" TEXT /* Date of the day with the maximum distance traveled */,
  "peak_duration_day" TEXT /* Date of the day with the maximum duration on the wheelchair */,
  "peak_distance_from_home_day" TEXT /* Date of the day with the maximum distance from home */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_long_term_mobility_trends_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the health metric (e.g., blood pressure, heart rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the health metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the health metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of health metric (e.g., vital sign, lab result) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., cardiology, neurology) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time the data was accessed */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the data belongs to */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., wearable device, manual entry) */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the imported data */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the imported data in MB */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* Type of data imported (e.g., mobility, health metrics) */,
  "import_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the import (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "import_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the import */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
